title: Highly Detailed Ultra Premium Portrait Woman That
sourceTitle: Highly Detailed Ultra Premium Portrait Woman That
prompt: A highly detailed, ultra-premium portrait of a woman that seamlessly blends hyper-realistic textures with artistic, hand-drawn elements. She has a sleek blonde bob haircut with soft pink highlights, striking green eyes, and glossy lips. She wears a vibrant lime green tank top, a black fabric choker necklace, and a delicate silver chain. Her skin shows realistic, fine texture, but one side of her face, neck, and shoulder is cast in dramatic, sketchy purple neon shadows, mimicking a colored pencil overlay. The background is a stark contrast, featuring a textured, glossy lime green surface interwoven with loose, playful doodle art, including abstract green swirls and small purple star and sun motifs. The lighting is cinematic, creating a unique hybrid look between commercial fashion photography and a vivid digital sketch.
